cards.title: Problem Card 1 — Youth Unemployment
cards.problem: Many young people struggle to find jobs after school.
cards.think_about_it: How could technology help young people find work or create work?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 2 — Lack of Career Guidance
cards.problem: Many learners do not know what careers to choose or how to prepare.
cards.think_about_it: How could learners get better career advice early?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 3 — School Dropout
cards.problem: Some learners leave school before finishing matric.
cards.think_about_it: How could schools help learners stay motivated and supported?

cards.title: Problem Card 4 — Poor Study Support
cards.problem: Many learners do not have enough help with homework and revision.
cards.think_about_it: How could learners get help outside the classroom?

cards.title: Problem Card 5 — Limited Access to Internet
cards.problem: Not everyone has reliable internet for learning and opportunities.
cards.think_about_it: How could communities access affordable digital learning?

cards.title: Problem Card 6 — Limited Access to Devices
cards.problem: Some young people do not have laptops or smart devices to learn with.
cards.think_about_it: How could more learners access technology tools?

cards.title: Problem Card 7 — Illegal Dumping
cards.problem: Waste is often dumped in open spaces, making areas dirty and unsafe.
cards.think_about_it: How could the community reduce illegal dumping?

cards.title: Problem Card 8 — Poor Waste Collection
cards.problem: Garbage is not always collected quickly or efficiently.
cards.think_about_it: How could waste collection become smarter?

cards.title: Problem Card 9 — Crime and Safety Concerns
cards.problem: Residents worry about theft, robbery, and unsafe areas.
cards.think_about_it: How could safety be improved in the community?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 10 — Poor Street Lighting
cards.problem: Some streets are too dark at night, increasing fear and risk.
cards.think_about_it: How could dark areas be identified and fixed faster?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 11 — Potholes and Damaged Roads
cards.problem: Roads may be damaged, making travel unsafe and slow.
cards.think_about_it: How could road problems be reported and fixed faster?

cards.title: Problem Card 12 — Traffic Congestion
cards.problem: Busy roads and traffic delays waste time and increase stress.
cards.think_about_it: How could transport move more smoothly?

cards.title: Problem Card 13 — Taxi Safety and Coordination
cards.problem: Commuters need safer, more reliable transport information.
cards.think_about_it: How could transport information become more useful?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 14 — Small Businesses Struggle to Find Customers
cards.problem: Many local businesses struggle to attract enough customers.
cards.think_about_it: How could local businesses reach more people?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 15 — Youth Businesses Lack Support
cards.problem: Young entrepreneurs may have ideas but lack support to grow.
cards.think_about_it: How could young business owners get practical support?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 16 — Lack of Financial Literacy
cards.problem: Some young people and families struggle to manage money well.
cards.think_about_it: How could people learn money skills more easily?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 17 — Food Insecurity
cards.problem: Some households struggle to get enough nutritious food.
cards.think_about_it: How could communities improve food access?

cards.title: Problem Card 18 — Mental Health Stress
cards.problem: Many young people face stress, anxiety, and emotional pressure.
cards.think_about_it: How could young people get support earlier?

cards.title: Problem Card 19 — Substance Abuse
cards.problem: Drug and alcohol abuse can affect young people and families.
cards.think_about_it: How could communities protect youth better?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 20 — Limited Access to Healthcare Information
cards.problem: People may not know enough about prevention, symptoms, or where to get help.
cards.think_about_it: How could health information reach more people?

cards.title: Problem Card 21 — Long Queues for Services
cards.problem: Residents often spend a long time waiting for services.
cards.think_about_it: How could services become faster and better organised?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 22 — Water Leaks and Water Waste
cards.problem: Water leaks and poor monitoring can waste an important resource.
cards.think_about_it: How could leaks be spotted and fixed earlier?

cards.title: Problem Card 23 — Electricity Problems
cards.problem: Power interruptions affect learning, business, and daily life.
cards.think_about_it: How could people manage better during electricity problems?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 24 — Lack of Safe Recreational Spaces
cards.problem: Young people may not have enough safe places to learn, play, and create.
cards.think_about_it: How could more safe youth spaces be created?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 25 — Gender-Based Violence Awareness
cards.problem: Communities need stronger awareness, prevention, and support systems.
cards.think_about_it: How could people get help safely and quickly?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 26 — Poor Access to Local Opportunities
cards.problem: People often miss opportunities because they do not hear about them in time.
cards.think_about_it: How could opportunities reach more young people?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 27 — Weak Community Reporting Systems
cards.problem: Residents may not know how to report local problems effectively.
cards.think_about_it: How could reporting local issues become easier?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions

cards.title: Problem Card 28 — Poor Local Business Data
cards.problem: Small businesses often do not track enough information to improve.
cards.think_about_it: How could business owners make better decisions?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 29 — Skills Mismatch
cards.problem: Young people may study things that do not match available opportunities.
cards.think_about_it: How could learners build more relevant future skills?
sdg_goals: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

cards.title: Problem Card 30 — Community Problems Are Not Solved Early
cards.problem: Many community problems grow because they are noticed too late.
cards.think_about_it: How could communities spot and solve problems earlier?
sdg_goals: SDG 16: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions
